title: New version: CPH2611_15.0.0.600(EX01)
description:
New version: CPH2611_15.0.0.600(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

System

• Integrates the February 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

• Improves system stability and performance.

• Fixes an issue where your device might restart in some scenarios.

Interconnection

• Fixes an issue where the sound and picture are not in sync while playing videos through Bluetooth headphones.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During Installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
